name: Mark's Very Own Fried Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Ensure the rice has been cooked ahead of time and is well cooled.
2. Heat about 2 to 3 tablespoons vegetable oil in a wok. When hot, add onions and garlic and fry for 3 minutes.
3. Add carrots and stir-fry for 2 minutes.
4. Add the remaining vegetables and continue to stir-fry for 2 or 3 minutes.
5. Toss in the chili pieces and ginger root. Cook for a few seconds.
6. Carefully stir in the cold rice. Lower heat and continue to cook, stirring occasionally for 5 minutes.
7. Add enough soy sauce to coat the rice and cook for another 5 minutes on low heat, stirring often to prevent sticking.
8. Season with salt and pepper if desired. Serve when heated through.
This dish pairs well with spicy tofu dishes or works as a main dish on its own. For added heat, include more chili pieces. Use pieces rather than powder because they are spicier. Occasionally, I add a few strips of tofu just before adding the spices.
